gauge.name: Tuscarawas River at Dover Dam Tailwater

impacts.statement: Water reaches the first floor of several homes just upstream of the city of Dover
Water begins to surround several homes just upstream of the city of Dover
Water reaches several homes just upstream of the city of Dover
Tuscarawas river begins to flow out of it's banks.
